fix_summary: The proposed change correctly fixes the business-class seat-type mapping in `_seat_type_for`, aligning A/D to `window` and B/C to `aisle` without altering unrelated cabin logic. Automated tests passed, indicating the localized fix resolves the issue as intended.
approval_reasons: The diff is minimal and directly addresses the root cause identified in the issue.
Business-class mapping is corrected exactly as required: A/D -> window, B/C -> aisle.
Other cabin logic remains unchanged in the patch.
Automated tests passed (4/4), which is the source of truth for readiness.
